title: Notification No.27/2001-Cus(NT), dated 31.5.2001
text: 31st May, 2001 NotificationNo. 27/2001-Cus.(N.T) In exercise of the powers conferred by section 157, read with sections 50 and 60 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Shipping Bill and Bill of Export (Form) Regulations, namely :- 1. (1) These regulations may be called the Shipping Bill and Bill of Export (Form) Amendment Regulations, 2001. (2) They shall come into force on the 15th June, 2001. 2. In the form specified in each of the Annexure I, Annexure II, Annexure III, Annexure IV, Annexure V, Annexure VI, Annexure VII, Annexure VIII appended to the Shipping Bill and Bill of Export (Form) Regulations, 1991, - (a) for the box and the word "Exporter" therein, the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Exporter, whether Government or Private "; (b) for the box and the words "Import-Export Code No." therein, the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Import-Export Code No. and BIN" ; (c) for the box and the letters and words "RBI Code No." therein, the following shall be substituted, namely:- "State of origin of goods" ; (d) in the box relating to Marks & Nos, No. & kind of Pkgs, container Nos. and Statistical Code & Description of Goods, for the words "Statistical Code & Description of Goods", the words "Statistical Code, Description of Goods, and EXIM Scheme Code, where applicable" shall be substituted; (e) for the box and the words and letters ""Value FOB" therein, the following shall be substituted, namely,- " Value ______________ FOB PMV Where applicable ". -- 1 of 2 -- Rajendra Singh Under secretary to the government of india F.No.434/4/2001-CUS.IV Note: The principal notification No.61/91-Customs (N.T.), dated the 29th August, 1991 was issued vide GSR 552 (E), dated the 29th August, 1991. -- 2 of 2 --
